title: Dexter has a unicorn sandwich 💩 YTP
description:
Dexter is terminally ill with hair cancer, so he visits the girls who share with him the joys of the hidden realm.

Those of you looking for the hidden joke I stole, HERE IS THE ANSWER....
Robotnik-sun... HAHAHAHAHA (Stolen from Stegblob)
also...
Rita... IN YOUR FACE (Stolen from 1up)
also...
Old-bear... TREE (Stolen from.. I have no idea)

"Jetboots" which is mentioned a few times is one of my few recurring jokes, and appears in this, "Dexter is a furry", "Sperms with frickin lazer beams" and others! SO NOW YOU KNOW!

THESE ARE HOMAGES OK HAHAHAHAHAH LOLZ

#ytp #dexterslaboratory
